compare-pdf-page-range.title: Compare Selected Page Range of Two PDFs
compare-pdf-page-range.description: Loads two PDF files, configures ComparisonOptions to limit the comparison to a specific page range, and generates a PDF showing the differences.

compare-pdfs-page-by-page.title: Compare Two PDFs Page by Page and Save Diff PDF
compare-pdfs-page-by-page.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents page by page using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer with default ComparisonOptions and store the resulting diff PDF.

compare-selected-pages.title: Compare Selected Pages of Two PDFs
compare-selected-pages.description: Demonstrates how to compare specific pages of two PDF documents by passing an array of page numbers to the Document.Compare overload.

compare-pdfs-excluded-areas.title: Compare PDFs with Excluded Areas
compare-pdfs-excluded-areas.description: Demonstrates how to exclude specific rectangular regions from two PDFs using ComparisonOptions before performing a page‑by‑page comparison.

compare-selected-pages__v2.title: Compare Selected Pages of Two PDFs
compare-selected-pages__v2.description: Loads two PDF files, sets a page range in ComparisonOptions, and compares only those pages, saving the diff result.

compare-pdfs-page-by-page__v2.title: Compare Two PDFs Page by Page and Save Diff PDF
compare-pdfs-page-by-page__v2.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents page by page using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer with default options and store the visual differences in a new PDF file.

compare-selected-pages__v3.title: Compare Selected Pages of Two PDFs
compare-selected-pages__v3.description: Shows how to compare specific pages of two PDF documents by passing an array of page numbers to the Document.Compare overload.

exclude-regions-pdf-comparison.title: Exclude Specific Regions in PDF Comparison
exclude-regions-pdf-comparison.description: Shows how to define rectangular exclusion areas for both PDFs and run a comparison using ComparisonOptions.

exclude-footers-from-pdf-comparison.title: Exclude Footers from PDF Comparison
exclude-footers-from-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to exclude footer regions from PDF comparison by specifying rectangular areas in the comparison options.

compare-pdfs-ignore-case.title: Compare PDFs Ignoring Case Differences
compare-pdfs-ignore-case.description: Shows how to compare two PDF files while ignoring case differences by setting ComparisonOptions.IgnoreCase before invoking the comparison API.

compare-scanned-pdfs-tolerance.title: Compare Scanned PDFs with Custom Image Tolerance
compare-scanned-pdfs-tolerance.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom image similarity tolerance using GraphicalPdfComparer.Threshold when comparing two scanned PDF documents.

compare-pdfs-with-form-fields.title: Compare PDFs with Form Fields Including Values
compare-pdfs-with-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs that contain form fields and include the field values in the diff by enabling the appropriate ComparisonOptions flag.

compare-pdfs-ignore-signatures.title: Compare PDFs while Ignoring Signature Fields
compare-pdfs-ignore-signatures.description: Compares two PDF documents and excludes digital signature fields from the comparison, treating them as unchanged regions.

side-by-side-pdf-comparison.title: Side-by-side PDF comparison with different page sizes
side-by-side-pdf-comparison.description: Compares two PDFs that have different page dimensions using SideBySidePdfComparer and saves the result, demonstrating that content is aligned despite size differences.

compare-pdf-text-ignore-compression.title: Compare PDFs Textually Ignoring Compression Differences
compare-pdf-text-ignore-compression.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs that differ only in compression using TextPdfComparer so that compression does not affect the textual diff results.

compare-pdfs-unicode.title: Compare PDFs with Unicode Text Differences
compare-pdfs-unicode.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs containing different language encodings and detect Unicode text differences using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer.

compare-pdf-font-differences.title: Compare PDFs and Detect Font Differences
compare-pdf-font-differences.description: Loads two PDFs, compares them using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer, and lists diff operations, demonstrating that font changes are reported as separate diff entries.

compare-encrypted-pdfs.title: Compare Encrypted PDFs with Passwords
compare-encrypted-pdfs.description: Loads two password‑protected PDF files by supplying the user password to the Document constructors and runs a page‑by‑page comparison, saving the diff PDF.

visual-diff-pdf.title: Generate Visual Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
visual-diff-pdf.description: Creates a visual comparison PDF that highlights differences between two PDF documents using GraphicalPdfComparer.

get-pdf-image-differences.title: Get Image Differences Between Two PDFs
get-pdf-image-differences.description: Loads two PDF files, compares the first pages graphically, and saves an image highlighting the differences.

generate-diff-pdf.title: Generate Diff PDF Highlighting Changes Using GraphicalPdfComparer
generate-diff-pdf.description: Creates a diff PDF that highlights changes between two PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer.

generate-diff-pdf-highlight.title: Generate Diff PDF with Highlighted Text Changes
generate-diff-pdf-highlight.description: Creates two PDFs, compares them using GraphicalPdfComparer, generates a diff PDF with default highlight color, and verifies the default color.

json-diff-report.title: Generate JSON Diff Report from PDF Comparison
json-diff-report.description: Loads two PDFs, obtains a list of DiffOperation objects from a comparison, and creates a JSON report using JsonDiffOutputGenerator, optionally saving it to a file.

replace-changed-text-using-diffoperation.title: Replace changed text in PDF using DiffOperation
replace-changed-text-using-diffoperation.description: Compares two PDFs, extracts the original text via DiffOperation objects, and replaces the modified text in the second PDF with the original text.

compare-pdfs-log-differences.title: Compare Two PDFs and Log Differences
compare-pdfs-log-differences.description: Compares two PDF documents page‑by‑page using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer and writes each detected change type with its page number to a text file.

universal-pdf-comparison.title: Universal PDF Comparison with Embedded Multimedia
universal-pdf-comparison.description: Shows how to compare two PDFs—including those containing embedded multimedia—using Aspose.Pdf's generic TextPdfComparer and save a visual diff PDF.

copy-metadata-to-diff-pdf.title: Copy Metadata to PDF Comparison Result
copy-metadata-to-diff-pdf.description: Compares two PDFs, generates a side‑by‑side diff PDF and copies the original document's metadata to the diff file.

multi-threaded-pdf-comparison.title: Multi-threaded PDF Comparison using Aspose.Pdf
multi-threaded-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates comparing multiple PDF pairs concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's SideBySidePdfComparer in a multi‑threaded environment.

parallel-pdf-comparison.title: Parallel PDF Comparison with Concurrency Limit
parallel-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to compare many PDF files against a reference PDF in parallel while limiting the number of concurrent operations to control memory usage.

compare-pdfs-diff-zip.title: Compare PDFs and Export Difference Images to ZIP
compare-pdfs-diff-zip.description: Compares two PDF documents graphically, saves the difference images to a folder, and packages them into a ZIP archive.
